chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 983 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 07.12.2022 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Jakhar, Advocate for respondents-Municipal Committee, Khairpur. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel appearing for Municipal Committee, Khairpur submits through compliance report of Accounts Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur an original cheque bearing No.37211650 dated 07.12.2022 amounting to Rs.2,18,002/- (Rupees two lac eighteen thousand and two) in favour of the petitioner, being remaining outstanding arrears of his service/pensionary benefits, which is received by the petitioner, who is present in person, under acknowledgment on photocopy of the cheque. Since the petitioner has received his service/pensionary benefits, the petition has served its purpose; hence, learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press the same any further. Accordingly, petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
